text: Operator retraction: people scalp this data profitably daily, so positive-EV trades demonstrably exist; the −EV figure was an average over the wrong trades the weak policy opens.

locator.quote: The real blocker is a TRAINING-STABILITY failure, not an economic wall

text: The real blocker is a training-stability failure (PPO collapses to an absorbing NOOP), not an economic wall.

locator.quote: descriptive of the CURRENT weak policy, NOT a limit on what a well-trained

text: The pwin/commission/fill-rate analysis is descriptive of the current weak policy, not a limit on what a well-trained one can find.
